# Joseph G Media - Motion Design & Video Production

> Sydney-based motion designer and 3D animator with 10+ years experience in broadcast, advertising, and live events. Specialising in motion graphics, 3D animation, videography, and multimedia production.

## About Joseph Giuffrida

Joseph Giuffrida is a Senior Motion Designer based in Sydney, Australia. Currently at The Electric Canvas, he has built experience across leading agencies including Saatchi & Saatchi and Omnicom. His work spans large-scale architectural projection, advertising, broadcast, live events, and branded content.

## Services

- Motion Design & 2D Animation (After Effects, character rigging)
- 3D Animation (Cinema 4D, Octane Render)
- Videography & Video Editing
- Colour Grading (DaVinci Resolve)
- Sound Design & Music Composition
- AI & Generative Design
- Graphic Design & Illustration
- Photography

## Featured Work

- [Bundaberg CeRUMony Wedding Campaign](https://josephgmedia.com/work/bundaberg.html): Videography and editing for viral wedding campaign - 24.8M earned impressions, 167 pieces of media coverage
- [NLA Enlighten Festival 2025](https://josephgmedia.com/work/nla-enlighten.html): Large-scale projection mapping at National Library of Australia using AI animation workflows
- [Porsche x Dr Jack](https://josephgmedia.com/work/porsche-drjack.html): VFX design and 3D animation for holographic UI environment
- [RAMS Home Loans](https://josephgmedia.com/work/rams-construction.html): 3D animation and art direction for educational content series
- [Gryff - Losing Touch](https://josephgmedia.com/work/gryff.html): Music video director, DOP, and editor for 80s synthwave track
- [Weightless - A State of Mind](https://josephgmedia.com/work/weightless.html): 3D artwork and visual identity for EP release package

## Major Clients

Ampol, Qantas, Toyota, Lexus, Porsche, Nivea, L'Oréal, Estée Lauder, Heineken, Bombay Sapphire, Coles, Pepsi, Visa, NSW Government, Victorian Government, Bundaberg Rum, Hyundai, Kia, Nescafé, National Library of Australia

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- **Experience:** 10+ years in motion design and video production
- **Current Role:** Senior Motion Designer at The Electric Canvas, Sydney
- **Notable Agencies:** Saatchi & Saatchi, Omnicom
- **Specialties:** Architectural projection mapping, broadcast design, 3D animation, branded content, music videos
- **Education:** Degree in Music (sound design and composition background)
- **Awards:** Work has won at The One Show, Caples Awards, ONE Asia Creative Awards (2024)
